title: Pan-Seared Pull Uruguayan Cheese Wok-Fried
description: Citrusy, cheese-pull Uruguayan dish featuring dried cherries, ice-bath-shock, and wok-fried goodness.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of wok oil over medium-high heat in a wok.
Add 1 tablespoon of butter and let melt.
Add chopped dried cherries, minced garlic, and cook for 2 minutes.
Add chopped fresh mint and cook for 1 minute.
Add shredded Parmesan cheese and crumbled Queso fresco, stir until combined.
Push the mixture to the side of the wok.
Crack 2 eggs into the empty side of the wok and scramble them.
Mix the eggs with the cheese mixture.
Transfer the wok mixture to a plate and chill in an ice bath for 10 minutes.
Reheat the wok over medium heat and add the chilled mixture.
Stir-fry for 2-3 minutes until the cheese is melted and the mixture is heated through.
Season with salt and orange zest.
